entry.title: ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ !?

link.title: ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಮತ್ತೆ ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ !?

entry.content:
ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ನಾಳಿನಿಂದ ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ ಸಡಿಲಿಕೆ ಆಗುತ್ತಿದೆ . ಆದರೆ ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಜನ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯರು ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ ಮುಂದುವರಿಸುವಂತೆ ಜನಪ್ರತಿನಿಧಿಗಳನ್ನು ಕೇಳಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
Lockdown is being eased from tomorrow but people of Dakshina Kannada are asking their leaders to continue lockdown
entry.summary: ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ನಾಳಿನಿಂದ ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ ಸಡಿಲಿಕೆ ಆಗುತ್ತಿದೆ . ಆದರೆ ದಕ್ಷಿಣ ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಜನ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯರು ಲಾಕ್ ಡೌನ್ ಮುಂದುವರಿಸುವಂತೆ ಜನಪ್ರತಿನಿಧಿಗಳನ್ನು ಕೇಳಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. Lockdown is being eased from tomorrow but people of Dakshina Kannada are asking their leaders to continue lockdown

entry.title: Nimue - The Wolf-Blood Witch

link.title: Nimue - The Wolf-Blood Witch

entry.content:
"Why? Are you afraid of witches?"
So I watched Cursed. It gave me major Witcher vibes. And Daniel Sharman and Katherine Langford are stunning. Mwah chefs kiss.
entry.summary: "Why? Are you afraid of witches?" So I watched Cursed. It gave me major Witcher vibes. And Daniel Sharman and Katherine Langford are stunning. Mwah chefs kiss.

entry.title: Will Metro Manila revert to MECQ by August 1?

link.title: Will Metro Manila revert to MECQ by August 1?

entry.content:
The government has yet to decide if Metro Manila will revert to the stricter lockdown starting next month amid the latest surge in coronavirus cases.
READ:
entry.summary: The government has yet to decide if Metro Manila will revert to the stricter lockdown starting next month amid the latest surge in coronavirus cases. READ:

entry.title: Priyanka Chopra संग Romantic हुए Nick Jonas, Priyanka ने लिखा ये Romantic Note । Boldsky

link.title: Priyanka Chopra संग Romantic हुए Nick Jonas, Priyanka ने लिखा ये Romantic Note । Boldsky

entry.content:
Priyanka Chopra Jonas, an actress who has traveled from Bollywood to Hollywood, is often in the headlines for some reason or the other. Pop star Nick Jonas proposed Priyanka for the wedding two years ago. Priyanka recalls the occasion and shared a romantic note for her husband Nick from her Instagram handle.
बॉलीवुड से हॉलीवुड तक का सफर तय करने वाली एक्ट्रेस प्रियंका चोपड़ा जोनास अक्सर किसी न किसी वजह से सुर्ख़ियों में रहती हैं. पॉप स्टार निक जोनास ने दो साल पहले ही प्रियंका को शादी के लिए प्रोपोज़ किया था. प्रियंका ने इस मौके को याद करते हुए अपने इंस्टाग्राम हैंडल से अपने पति निक के लिए एक रोमांटिक नोट शेयर किया है.
#PriyankaChopra
entry.summary: Priyanka Chopra Jonas, an actress who has traveled from Bollywood to Hollywood, is often in the headlines for some reason or the other. Pop star Nick Jonas proposed Priyanka for the wedding two years ago. Priyanka recalls the occasion and shared a romantic note for her husband Nick from her Instagram handle. बॉलीवुड से हॉलीवुड तक का सफर तय करने वाली एक्ट्रेस प्रियंका चोपड़ा जोनास अक्सर किसी न किसी वजह से सुर्ख़ियों में रहती हैं. पॉप स्टार निक जोनास ने दो साल पहले ही प्रियंका को शादी के लिए प्रोपोज़ किया था. प्रियंका ने इस मौके को याद करते हुए अपने इंस्टाग्राम हैंडल से अपने पति निक के लिए एक रोमांटिक नोट शेयर किया है. #PriyankaChopra

entry.title: Komplotan Pencuri Kendaraan Bermotor di Banjarmasin Berhasil Diringkus Polisi, Diantaranya Pasutri

link.title: Komplotan Pencuri Kendaraan Bermotor di Banjarmasin Berhasil Diringkus Polisi, Diantaranya Pasutri

entry.content:
BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Empat pelaku pencurian kendaraan bermotor di Banjarmasin berhasil ditangkap jajaran Polresta Banjarmasin.
Ironisnya, diantara para pelaku adalah pasangan suami-istri berinisial G dan F sudah beraksi sebanyak 28 kali dari bulan februari hingga juli 2020.
Aksi pasutri ini dibantu dua tersangka lain yaitu AM dan R. Keduanya bahkan telah beraksi sejak tahun lalu di beberapa wilayah seperti Banjarbaru, Martapura, dan Barito Kuala.
"Bahkan pelaku AM dan R telah melakukan aksinya dari bulan Agustus 2019 hingga 8 Juli 2020 yakni sebanyak 17 kali," Terang Kapolresta Banjarmasin, Kombes Rachmat Hendrawan kepada kompas.tv, senin (20/7/2020).
Ketiga pria dalam kasus pencurian kendaraan bermotor ini adalah residivis yang sebelumnya telah bebas usai jalani hukuman.
Berdasar pemeriksaan polisi, komplotan ini beraksi di kota Banjarmasin dan mencuri kendaraan di 20 lokasi , kota banjarbaru 4 lokasi, kabupaten Banjar 2 lokasi dan kabupaten barito kuala 2 lokasi atau tempat kejadian perkara.
Rata rata, incaran mereka adalah sepeda motor jenis matic yang dapat mereka curi dalam hitungan waktu cepat .
Para pelaku diketahui menjual cepat kendaraan bermotor hasil curian mereka dikisaran harga 3 juta rupiah.
Dari mereka polisi temukan sejumlah barang bukti berupa alat alat yang digunakan memuluskan pencurian kendaraan bermotor seperti kunci letter T dan gerinda serta 9 unit sepeda motor yang belum sempat dijual.
entry.summary: BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Empat pelaku pencurian kendaraan bermotor di Banjarmasin berhasil ditangkap jajaran Polresta Banjarmasin. Ironisnya, diantara para pelaku adalah pasangan suami-istri berinisial G dan F sudah beraksi sebanyak 28 kali dari bulan februari hingga juli 2020. Aksi pasutri ini dibantu dua tersangka lain yaitu AM dan R. Keduanya bahkan telah beraksi sejak tahun lalu di beberapa wilayah seperti Banjarbaru, Martapura, dan Barito Kuala. "Bahkan pelaku AM dan R telah melakukan aksinya dari bulan Agustus 2019 hingga 8 Juli 2020 yakni sebanyak 17 kali," Terang Kapolresta Banjarmasin, Kombes Rachmat Hendrawan kepada kompas.tv, senin (20/7/2020). Ketiga pria dalam kasus pencurian kendaraan bermotor ini adalah residivis yang sebelumnya telah bebas usai jalani hukuman. Berdasar pemeriksaan polisi, komplotan ini beraksi di kota Banjarmasin dan mencuri kendaraan di 20 lokasi , kota banjarbaru 4 lokasi, kabupaten Banjar 2 lokasi dan kabupaten barito kuala 2 lokasi atau tempat kejadian perkara. Rata rata, incaran mereka adalah sepeda motor jenis matic yang dapat mereka curi dalam hitungan waktu cepat . Para pelaku diketahui menjual cepat kendaraan bermotor hasil curian mereka dikisaran harga 3 juta rupiah. Dari mereka polisi temukan sejumlah barang bukti berupa alat alat yang digunakan memuluskan pencurian kendaraan bermotor seperti kunci letter T dan gerinda serta 9 unit sepeda motor yang belum sempat dijual.

entry.title: Deewangi Episode 36

link.title: Deewangi Episode 36

entry.content:
Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence.
Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh.
Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?
entry.summary: Living with her cruel brother-in-law, ambitious Nageen Faiyaz works several menial jobs to break free from the shackles of poverty and dependence. Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh. Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?

entry.title: Qurbatain Episode 5 HUM TV Drama 20 July 2020

link.title: Qurbatain Episode 5 HUM TV Drama 20 July 2020

entry.content:
Qurbatain, Episode 5, Official HD Video - 20 July 2020
Produced under the banner of MD Productions, drama serial Qurbatain is HUM TV’s newest presentation that revolves around friendship, lust and deceit. It is an intertwined story of two friends Areeba and Zamal and highlights how low one can stoop to gain a luxurious life but at what cost. Areeba, raised by a single mother belongs to a low-middle class family while Zamal belongs to an upper-class family. Lured by wealth and luxurious life, Areeba takes some dreadful steps that put an irreparable dent on the sacred bond of friendship and her morality, but little does she know what fate has in store for her.
Starring:
Anmol Baloch, Shehbaz Hamid Shigri, Komal Sajid, Arij Moheuddin, Kashif Mahmood, Munazzah Arif, Tahira Imam, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Laiba Sarfaraz, Leyla Zuberi, Ahmed Taha Ghani, Kamran Hussain, Halima, Zain Afzal and others.
Directed By: Kamran Akbar Khan
Written By: Rizwan Ahmed
Produced By: Momina Duraid Productions
#Qurbatain #HUMTV #AnmolBaloch #ShehbazHamidShigri #KomalSajid #ArijMoheuddin
entry.summary: Qurbatain, Episode 5, Official HD Video - 20 July 2020 Produced under the banner of MD Productions, drama serial Qurbatain is HUM TV’s newest presentation that revolves around friendship, lust and deceit. It is an intertwined story of two friends Areeba and Zamal and highlights how low one can stoop to gain a luxurious life but at what cost. Areeba, raised by a single mother belongs to a low-middle class family while Zamal belongs to an upper-class family. Lured by wealth and luxurious life, Areeba takes some dreadful steps that put an irreparable dent on the sacred bond of friendship and her morality, but little does she know what fate has in store for her. Starring: Anmol Baloch, Shehbaz Hamid Shigri, Komal Sajid, Arij Moheuddin, Kashif Mahmood, Munazzah Arif, Tahira Imam, Abbas Ashraf Awan, Laiba Sarfaraz, Leyla Zuberi, Ahmed Taha Ghani, Kamran Hussain, Halima, Zain Afzal and others. Directed By: Kamran Akbar Khan Written By: Rizwan Ahmed Produced By: Momina Duraid Productions #Qurbatain #HUMTV #AnmolBaloch #ShehbazHamidShigri #KomalSajid #ArijMoheuddin

One Direction fans lose their minds, beg for reunion after band’s first … 1BreakingNews.com
It’s been 10 years since the formation of One Direction. Fans want a reunion. But this is what we actually know is in store so far.
Copyright usatoday.com
entry.summary: One Direction fans lose their minds, beg for reunion after band’s first … 1BreakingNews.com It’s been 10 years since the formation of One Direction. Fans want a reunion. But this is what we actually know is in store so far. Copyright usatoday.com

entry.title: Paris : un apéro géant sur les quais de Seine

link.title: Paris : un apéro géant sur les quais de Seine

entry.content:
Musique, foule, rencontres… Nous sommes au cœur de Paris, dans un événement gratuit et ouvert à tous.
Comme tous les vendredis soirs de l’été, Vendredix-sur-Seine, c’est le nom de l’événement, accueille un public nombreux à l’extérieur, bien loin des distances de un mètre demandées. La semaine dernière dans la capitale, 212 personnes ont été testées positives au Covid. Cele représente 64 cas supplémentaires par rapport à la première semaine de juillet.
Sur leur site, les organisateurs indiquent qu’ils sont très loin de la limite des 5.000 personnes. Pour eux, les événements extérieurs ne présentent pas de danger majeur.
entry.summary: Musique, foule, rencontres… Nous sommes au cœur de Paris, dans un événement gratuit et ouvert à tous. Comme tous les vendredis soirs de l’été, Vendredix-sur-Seine, c’est le nom de l’événement, accueille un public nombreux à l’extérieur, bien loin des distances de un mètre demandées. La semaine dernière dans la capitale, 212 personnes ont été testées positives au Covid. Cele représente 64 cas supplémentaires par rapport à la première semaine de juillet. Sur leur site, les organisateurs indiquent qu’ils sont très loin de la limite des 5.000 personnes. Pour eux, les événements extérieurs ne présentent pas de danger majeur.

entry.title: US Ordered China To Close Consulate In Houston Oneindia Telugu

link.title: US Ordered China To Close Consulate In Houston Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
అమెరికాలో అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికలు దగ్గరపడుతున్నకొద్దీ చైనాతో విభేదాలు తారా స్థాయికి చేరుతున్నాయి. రెండు దేశాల మధ్య ఇప్పటికే దెబ్బతిన్న బంధాలకు మరో అంశం తోడైంది. ఈసారి ఏకంగా అమెరికా గడ్డపైనున్న చైనా రాయబార కార్యాలయం మూసివేతకు ఆదేశాలు వెలువడటం సంచలనంగా మారింది.
#DonaldTrump
#China
#Chineseconsulate
#Houston
#USAvsChina
#ChineseForeignMinistry
#Beijing
#UnitedStates
entry.summary: అమెరికాలో అధ్యక్ష ఎన్నికలు దగ్గరపడుతున్నకొద్దీ చైనాతో విభేదాలు తారా స్థాయికి చేరుతున్నాయి. రెండు దేశాల మధ్య ఇప్పటికే దెబ్బతిన్న బంధాలకు మరో అంశం తోడైంది. ఈసారి ఏకంగా అమెరికా గడ్డపైనున్న చైనా రాయబార కార్యాలయం మూసివేతకు ఆదేశాలు వెలువడటం సంచలనంగా మారింది. #DonaldTrump #China #Chineseconsulate #Houston #USAvsChina #ChineseForeignMinistry #Beijing #UnitedStates

entry.title: Haryana में चाय वाला निकला बैंक का 50.76 करोड़ का कर्जदार, जानिए कैसे हुआ खुलासा वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Haryana में चाय वाला निकला बैंक का 50.76 करोड़ का कर्जदार, जानिए कैसे हुआ खुलासा वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Rajkumar, a tea seller in Kurukshetra district of Haryana, went to a finance company to take a loan of Rs 50,000, but the company refused to give the loan. You will be shocked to know the reason for not giving loan. The company said that Rajkumar already has a loan of about Rs 50.76 crore. Knowing this about himself, the prince’s senses flew away.
हरियाणा के कुरुक्षेत्र जिले में चाय बेचने वाला राजकुमार एक फाइनेंस कंपनी में 50 हजार रुपये का लोन लेने गया, लेकिन कंपनी ने लोन देने से इनकार कर दिया. लोन न देने की वजह जानकर आप चौंक जाएंगे. कंपनी ने कहा कि राजकुमार पर पहले से ही करीब 50.76 करोड़ रुपये का लोन है. अपने बारे में ये जानकर राजकुमार के होश उड़ गए.
#Haryana #Teaseller #Loan
entry.summary: Rajkumar, a tea seller in Kurukshetra district of Haryana, went to a finance company to take a loan of Rs 50,000, but the company refused to give the loan. You will be shocked to know the reason for not giving loan. The company said that Rajkumar already has a loan of about Rs 50.76 crore. Knowing this about himself, the prince’s senses flew away. हरियाणा के कुरुक्षेत्र जिले में चाय बेचने वाला राजकुमार एक फाइनेंस कंपनी में 50 हजार रुपये का लोन लेने गया, लेकिन कंपनी ने लोन देने से इनकार कर दिया. लोन न देने की वजह जानकर आप चौंक जाएंगे. कंपनी ने कहा कि राजकुमार पर पहले से ही करीब 50.76 करोड़ रुपये का लोन है. अपने बारे में ये जानकर राजकुमार के होश उड़ गए. #Haryana #Teaseller #Loan

entry.title: Try To Resist Ridiculing People With Mental Illness–Even Celebrities

link.title: Try To Resist Ridiculing People With Mental Illness–Even Celebrities

entry.content:
High-profile celebrities such as Kanye West and Britney Spears have been in the news lately, with much speculation about their mental health.
According to HuffPost, while it’s natural to be fascinated by unusual or outrageous behavior, it’s important to not let mental illness be a subject of ridicule.
Whether you’re aware of it or not, mental health issues are invisible illnesses that can affect anyone, including friends, family, and Instagram followers.
So if you’re going to comment, make comments like someone you love will read it.
Better yet, positively contribute to the conversation by sharing mental health resources or stories about your own experiences.
Avoid placing blame. Many have blamed Kanye’s wife, Kim Kardashian West, for not controlling her husband. Others have blamed Kanye.
But mental illness is nobody’s fault. Likewise, no one can control another human being.
And if these recommendations are all too much? Just consider not posting. Sometimes, silence really is golden.
entry.summary: High-profile celebrities such as Kanye West and Britney Spears have been in the news lately, with much speculation about their mental health. According to HuffPost, while it’s natural to be fascinated by unusual or outrageous behavior, it’s important to not let mental illness be a subject of ridicule. Whether you’re aware of it or not, mental health issues are invisible illnesses that can affect anyone, including friends, family, and Instagram followers. So if you’re going to comment, make comments like someone you love will read it. Better yet, positively contribute to the conversation by sharing mental health resources or stories about your own experiences. Avoid placing blame. Many have blamed Kanye’s wife, Kim Kardashian West, for not controlling her husband. Others have blamed Kanye. But mental illness is nobody’s fault. Likewise, no one can control another human being. And if these recommendations are all too much? Just consider not posting. Sometimes, silence really is golden.

entry.title: Covid-19: ‘Angels’ Ensure Dignity in Death

link.title: Covid-19: ‘Angels’ Ensure Dignity in Death

entry.content:
Multiple groups like Mercy Angels and Helping Hands in Bengaluru have been ensuring that Covid-19 deaths get dignified burial or cremation, while fighting the stigma associated with it.
Amulya speaks to a few volunteers about why they do what they do.
entry.summary: Multiple groups like Mercy Angels and Helping Hands in Bengaluru have been ensuring that Covid-19 deaths get dignified burial or cremation, while fighting the stigma associated with it. Amulya speaks to a few volunteers about why they do what they do.

entry.title: À 6 ans, ces enfants ont déjà intériorisé les inégalités hommes-femmes

link.title: À 6 ans, ces enfants ont déjà intériorisé les inégalités hommes-femmes

entry.content: Dans le documentaire "On ne naît pas féministe", diffusé sur LCP jeudi 23 juillet, la réalisatrice Ludivine Tomasi a assisté à un exercice de jeux de rôles dans une école. Les enfants doivent se mettre dans la peau du sexe opposé, et les avantages à être un garçon sont visiblement plus nombreux qu’à être une fille.
entry.summary: Dans le documentaire "On ne naît pas féministe", diffusé sur LCP jeudi 23 juillet, la réalisatrice Ludivine Tomasi a assisté à un exercice de jeux de rôles dans une école. Les enfants doivent se mettre dans la peau du sexe opposé, et les avantages à être un garçon sont visiblement plus nombreux qu’à être une fille.

entry.title: Can an environmental catastrophe in Yemen be averted? Inside Story

link.title: Can an environmental catastrophe in Yemen be averted? Inside Story

entry.content: Yemen faces an unprecedented disaster as a stranded oil tanker threatens extensive damage to marine life.
entry.summary: Yemen faces an unprecedented disaster as a stranded oil tanker threatens extensive damage to marine life.

entry.title: Cayetano: Unlike ABS-CBN, other newsrooms ‘not playing kingmaker’

link.title: Cayetano: Unlike ABS-CBN, other newsrooms ‘not playing kingmaker’

entry.content: Speaker Alan Peter Cayetano said lawmakers killed ABS-CBN’s franchise not to stifle the press, but because the media giant has long been playing “kingmaker” in the country. He also accuses Rappler of allegedly moving to oust President Duterte, but Rappler has repeatedly denied this allegation.
entry.summary: Speaker Alan Peter Cayetano said lawmakers killed ABS-CBN’s franchise not to stifle the press, but because the media giant has long been playing “kingmaker” in the country. He also accuses Rappler of allegedly moving to oust President Duterte, but Rappler has repeatedly denied this allegation.
